info.description: This is a Gift API server.
info.title: Gift API

get.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's information along with a credit summary.
Returns borrowings where the authenticated user is the To party.

post.description:
Records a new borrowing for the authenticated user. The lender
is set via from_user_id (registered user) or from_name (free string).

get.description: Returns a borrowing where the caller is the To party (borrower).

put.description:
Updates a borrowing where the lender is a free-form name. For
borrowings between two registered users, use FinanceRequests.

delete.description:
Deletes a one-OID borrowing, or a two-OID borrowing once it is
fully resolved.

post.description:
Records a repayment on a borrowing — increases resolved_amount.
For two-party credits this opens a FinanceRequest the lender must
approve. For one-OID credits the change is applied immediately.

Counterparty approves a pending FinanceRequest. The requester
cannot approve their own request — only the other party can.
On approval, the requested delta is applied to the credit.

Counterparty rejects a pending FinanceRequest — no change is
applied to the credit; the request is marked rejected.

Records that the borrower received more money — increases amount.
For two-party credits this opens a FinanceRequest the lender must
approve. For one-OID credits the change is applied immediately.

get.description: Returns all budgets for the authenticated user

post.description: Decreases the amount value for the specified budget of the authenticated user
post.summary: Decrease the amount of a budget

post.description: Increases the amount value for the specified budget of the authenticated user
post.summary: Increase the amount of a budget

get.description: Returns all incomes for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new income entry for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the income by its ObjectID, for the authenticated user

put.description: Updates an existing income by its ObjectID for the authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes an income entry for the authenticated user by its ObjectID

get.description: Returns lendings where the authenticated user is the From party.

post.description:
Records a new lending for the authenticated user. The borrower
is set via to_user_id (registered user) or to_name (free string).

get.description: Returns a lending where the caller is the From party (lender).

put.description:
Updates a lending where the borrower is a free-form name. For
lendings between two registered users, use FinanceRequests.

delete.description:
Deletes a one-OID lending, or a two-OID lending once it is
fully resolved.

post.description:
Records that the lender received money back — increases resolved_amount.
For two-party credits this opens a FinanceRequest the borrower
must approve. For one-OID credits the change is applied immediately.

Records that the lender extended more money — increases amount.
For two-party credits this opens a FinanceRequest the borrower
must approve. For one-OID credits the change is applied immediately.

Counterparty approves a pending FinanceRequest. The requester
cannot approve their own request — only the other party can.
On approval, the requested delta is applied to the credit.

Counterparty rejects a pending FinanceRequest — no change is
applied to the credit; the request is marked rejected.

get.description: Returns server identity (host/uptime/version), runtime stats and the authenticated user's profile

post.description: Export all collections data from the database in JSON or CSV format
Links a budget to a specified spending for the authenticated user
post.summary: Link a budget to a spending

post.description: Unlinks a budget from a specified spending for the authenticated user
post.summary: Unlink a budget from a spending

get.description: Returns a single user by their ID

delete.description: Deletes a user by their ID

post.description: Log in with email and password
Log out and revoke all refresh tokens for user
Refresh access and refresh tokens using a refresh token
Register a new user

get.description: Query all groups for the user by name. Returns groups where the user is the owner or a member.
get.summary: List or filter groups for the user

post.description: Create a new group

get.description: Get a specific group by its ID

put.description: Update a group's properties by id

post.description: Invite a member to a group (only owner can invite)
Remove a member from a group (only owner can remove)

get.description: Returns a list of spendings filtered by user_id, group_id, category, date range; supports limit/offset

post.description: Create a new spending record

get.description: Get a spending by its ID
